verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God sacrificed for me and you (thank you Jesus) God died on the cross for us (and He did it all) He did it all for me and you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God loves us, God loves us That he sacrificed, that he died on the cross for us God loves us, God loves us He did it all for me and you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus
